abilities.name: Light Bending
abilities.narrationHints: Curving light around objects or people — partial invisibility, mirages, redirected beams. The edges shimmer like heat haze.
abilities.description: Bend light around yourself or objects — concealment, mirage, or redirection.
abilities.notFor: Affecting anything physical (bent light stops no arrow); working in total darkness (it needs light to bend); undoing what someone already saw.

tree.name: Haze Veil
tree.grants: Blur yourself into a heat-shimmer while still — effectively unseen beyond 10 paces; dim or brighten a small room's light; throw a fist-sized false glint.
tree.cannot: Movement breaks it above a slow creep; your shadow stays true; touch reveals everything.

tree.name: Drawn Curtain
tree.grants: Move at walking pace veiled; cloak one companion standing close; project a simple still image (a closed door, an empty shelf) over reality for minutes.
tree.cannot: Images don't survive scrutiny from arm's length; fails under Harmonic sound-sight (echo senses ignore it).

tree.name: Second Sun
tree.grants: Full mirage-craft: a moving figure, a wall that isn't there, daylight in a cellar; blind a group for a breath with a soundless flash; split your image into three.
tree.cannot: Mirages are silent and scentless — sound gives them away; sustained work drains fast; Prism Sight of equal rank sees through it.

abilities.name: Prism Sight
abilities.narrationHints: Splitting light into revealing spectra — seeing heat traces, hidden markings, tampering, recent presence, and through glamours.
abilities.description: See the hidden spectra — heat traces, concealed marks, tampering, and lies of light.
abilities.notFor: Seeing through solid barriers (it reads light, not matter); reading thoughts; working with eyes closed or in absolute darkness.

tree.name: True Spectrum
tree.grants: See heat traces (a hand's warmth on a handle, a body's passage within minutes); spot tampering, overpainting, recent digging; notice light-bending at work.
tree.cannot: Traces fade in minutes to hours; rain and cold erase them; cannot identify WHO, only THAT.

tree.name: Layered Reading
tree.grants: Read a scene's last hour of light-history in still places; see through rank-1 veils and mirages; catch the micro-flush of a lie on a face in good light.
tree.cannot: Lie-reading is a hint, not proof (one reroll of a social sense, not a truth machine); crowded scenes smear.

tree.name: The Light Beneath
tree.grants: See the structural light of things: stress lines in a bridge, sickness in a body, active nanite flows, the seams of Precursor work; pierce any mirage of lower rank instantly.
tree.cannot: Minutes of use cost hours of eye-ache; what you see you cannot always name; some Precursor light looks back.

abilities.name: Radiant Lance
abilities.narrationHints: A coherent beam of focused light — silent, precise, instantaneous. Leaves clean scorch lines.
abilities.description: Focus light into a searing coherent beam — precise, silent, fast as sight.
abilities.notFor: Subtlety (the line of light is visible to everyone); nonlethal crowd control; cutting what light cannot heat (mirror-finish, running water).

tree.name: Needle Beam
tree.grants: A precise burn at 20 paces: sever a rope, scorch a hand into dropping a weapon, light tinder instantly, mark a surface permanently.
tree.cannot: Cannot penetrate armor or thick wood; one heartbeat of beam per breath; useless in smoke or fog.

tree.name: Cutting Line
tree.grants: Sustained cut: through a door bar, a cart axle, light armor at close range; deflect off a carried mirror to strike around a corner (with a wits check).
tree.cannot: Sustained cutting anchors you in place; the beam-line advertises your exact position; still fog-blind.

tree.name: Sunlance
tree.grants: A single devastating coherent strike — through a stone wall's weak point, a Harmonic shield's first rank, an engine block; can be flared wide as a blinding nonlethal burst instead.
tree.cannot: Once per scene; the flash is visible across the valley at night; double energy in Harmonic territory.

abilities.name: Daybreak Mantle
abilities.narrationHints: A soft radiance that gathers on the shoulders and face — commanding attention, lending hope and authority to the bearer.
abilities.description: Gather a mantle of soft radiance that inspires the hopeless and commands a room.
abilities.notFor: Stealth of any kind (you are literally glowing); coercion; hiding your identity (the mantle is memorable).

tree.name: Kindled Presence
tree.grants: A warm radiance that marks you as someone to hear out — first words always get listened to; lift the mood of a dim room; steady the hopeless for an hour.
tree.cannot: Attention is not agreement; draws every eye including hostile ones.

tree.name: Rallying Light
tree.grants: Extend courage to companions in sight — one reroll against fear or despair for the group per scene; your requests to strangers land as if from a respected local.
tree.cannot: Strangers' goodwill is shallow — one favor deep; wears off and they wonder why they agreed.

tree.name: Standard of Dawn
tree.grants: Become a beacon a crowd will follow through danger — organize a panicked evacuation, hold a line of frightened volunteers, make a mob hesitate before violence.
tree.cannot: Leadership, not control — where you lead them matters; afterward you are the most identifiable person in the valley.
